property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.3.9-hotspot in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.3.9-hotspot in;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Cloudflare\Cloudflare WARP\;C:\Program Files\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.15 in;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;c:\Users\Admin\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: tc01_validFirstName
testcase.system-out: === AccountValidator Test Suite Started === Running: TC01 - Valid first name returns true (EP: valid partition) Completed: TC01 - Valid first name returns true (EP: valid partition)

testcase.name: tc02_emptyFirstName
testcase.system-out: Running: TC02 - Empty first name returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC02 - Empty first name returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc03_firstNameWithDigits
testcase.system-out: Running: TC03 - First name with digits returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC03 - First name with digits returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc04_firstNameMinBoundary
testcase.system-out: Running: TC04 - First name of 1 character returns true (BVA: min boundary) Completed: TC04 - First name of 1 character returns true (BVA: min boundary)

testcase.name: tc05_firstNameMaxBoundary
testcase.system-out: Running: TC05 - First name of 50 characters returns true (BVA: max boundary) Completed: TC05 - First name of 50 characters returns true (BVA: max boundary)

testcase.name: tc06_firstNameAboveMax
testcase.system-out: Running: TC06 - First name of 51 characters returns false (BVA: above max) Completed: TC06 - First name of 51 characters returns false (BVA: above max)

testcase.name: tc07_firstNameXssPayload
testcase.system-out: Running: TC07 - First name with XSS payload returns false (Robustness) Completed: TC07 - First name with XSS payload returns false (Robustness)

testcase.name: tc08_nullFirstName
testcase.system-out: Running: TC08 - Null first name returns false (Null input) Completed: TC08 - Null first name returns false (Null input)

testcase.name: tc09_validLastName
testcase.system-out: Running: TC09 - Valid last name returns true (EP: valid partition) Completed: TC09 - Valid last name returns true (EP: valid partition)

testcase.name: tc10_emptyLastName
testcase.system-out: Running: TC10 - Empty last name returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC10 - Empty last name returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc11_lastNameWithDigits
testcase.system-out: Running: TC11 - Last name with digits returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC11 - Last name with digits returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc12_lastNameWithSpecialChars
testcase.system-out: Running: TC12 - Last name with special characters returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC12 - Last name with special characters returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc13_lastNameMinBoundary
testcase.system-out: Running: TC13 - Last name of 1 character returns true (BVA: min boundary) Completed: TC13 - Last name of 1 character returns true (BVA: min boundary)

testcase.name: tc14_lastNameMaxBoundary
testcase.system-out: Running: TC14 - Last name of 50 characters returns true (BVA: max boundary) Completed: TC14 - Last name of 50 characters returns true (BVA: max boundary)

testcase.name: tc15_lastNameAboveMax
testcase.system-out: Running: TC15 - Last name of 51 characters returns false (BVA: above max) Completed: TC15 - Last name of 51 characters returns false (BVA: above max)

testcase.name: tc16_lastNameSqlInjection
testcase.system-out: Running: TC16 - Last name with SQL injection payload returns false (Robustness) Completed: TC16 - Last name with SQL injection payload returns false (Robustness)

testcase.name: tc17_nullLastName
testcase.system-out: Running: TC17 - Null last name returns false (Null input) Completed: TC17 - Null last name returns false (Null input)

testcase.name: tc18_validEmail
testcase.system-out: Running: TC18 - Valid email returns true (EP: valid partition) Completed: TC18 - Valid email returns true (EP: valid partition)

testcase.name: tc19_emailMissingAt
testcase.system-out: Running: TC19 - Email missing @ returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC19 - Email missing @ returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc20_emptyEmail
testcase.system-out: Running: TC20 - Empty email returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC20 - Empty email returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc21_emailMissingDomainExtension
testcase.system-out: Running: TC21 - Email without domain extension returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC21 - Email without domain extension returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc22_emailMissingLocalPart
testcase.system-out: Running: TC22 - Email without local part returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC22 - Email without local part returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc23_emailWithSpaces
testcase.system-out: Running: TC23 - Email with spaces returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC23 - Email with spaces returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc24_nullEmail
testcase.system-out: Running: TC24 - Null email returns false (Null input) Completed: TC24 - Null email returns false (Null input)

testcase.name: tc25_validDob
testcase.system-out: Running: TC25 - Valid date of birth returns true (EP: valid partition) Completed: TC25 - Valid date of birth returns true (EP: valid partition)

testcase.name: tc26_dobWrongFormat
testcase.system-out: Running: TC26 - DOB with wrong format returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC26 - DOB with wrong format returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc27_dobFutureYear
testcase.system-out: Running: TC27 - DOB with future year returns false (EP + BVA: above boundary) Completed: TC27 - DOB with future year returns false (EP + BVA: above boundary)

testcase.name: tc28_impossibleDate
testcase.system-out: Running: TC28 - Impossible date (Feb 31st) returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC28 - Impossible date (Feb 31st) returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc29_dobToday
testcase.system-out: Running: TC29 - DOB of today returns true (BVA: at upper boundary) Completed: TC29 - DOB of today returns true (BVA: at upper boundary)

testcase.name: tc30_dobExactly120YearsAgo
testcase.system-out: Running: TC30 - DOB exactly 120 years ago returns true (BVA: lower boundary) Completed: TC30 - DOB exactly 120 years ago returns true (BVA: lower boundary)

testcase.name: tc31_dobOlderThan120Years
testcase.system-out: Running: TC31 - DOB older than 120 years returns false (BVA: below lower boundary) Completed: TC31 - DOB older than 120 years returns false (BVA: below lower boundary)

testcase.name: tc32_validPassword
testcase.system-out: Running: TC32 - Valid password returns true (EP: valid partition) Completed: TC32 - Valid password returns true (EP: valid partition)

testcase.name: tc33_passwordNoUppercase
testcase.system-out: Running: TC33 - Password with no uppercase returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC33 - Password with no uppercase returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc34_passwordNoDigit
testcase.system-out: Running: TC34 - Password without digit returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC34 - Password without digit returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc35_passwordNoSpecialChar
testcase.system-out: Running: TC35 - Password with no special char returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC35 - Password with no special char returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc36_passwordBelowMin
testcase.system-out: Running: TC36 - Password of 7 characters returns false (BVA: below min) Completed: TC36 - Password of 7 characters returns false (BVA: below min)

testcase.name: tc37_passwordAtMin
testcase.system-out: Running: TC37 - Password of exactly 8 characters returns true (BVA: at min) Completed: TC37 - Password of exactly 8 characters returns true (BVA: at min)

testcase.name: tc38_passwordBelowMax
testcase.system-out: Running: TC38 - Password of 63 characters returns true (BVA: below max) Completed: TC38 - Password of 63 characters returns true (BVA: below max)

testcase.name: tc39_passwordAtMax
testcase.system-out: Running: TC39 - Password of exactly 64 characters returns true (BVA: at max) Completed: TC39 - Password of exactly 64 characters returns true (BVA: at max)

testcase.name: tc40_passwordAboveMax
testcase.system-out: Running: TC40 - Password of 65 characters returns false (BVA: above max) Completed: TC40 - Password of 65 characters returns false (BVA: above max)

testcase.name: tc41_confirmPasswordMatch
testcase.system-out: Running: TC41 - Matching confirm password returns true (EP: valid partition) Completed: TC41 - Matching confirm password returns true (EP: valid partition)

testcase.name: tc42_confirmPasswordMismatch
testcase.system-out: Running: TC42 - Mismatched confirm password returns false (EP: invalid partition) Completed: TC42 - Mismatched confirm password returns false (EP: invalid partition)

testcase.name: tc43_nullConfirmPassword
testcase.system-out: Running: TC43 - Null confirm password returns false (Null input) Completed: TC43 - Null confirm password returns false (Null input)

testcase.name: tc44_bothNullPasswords
testcase.system-out: Running: TC44 - Both password and confirm password null returns false (Null input) Completed: TC44 - Both password and confirm password null returns false (Null input)
